About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Public Service Commission (UPPSC) is a government agency responsible for conducting civil services examinations in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India.

The UPPSC was established in 1937 and is headquartered in Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh.

About the Programme

The UPPSC Assistant Town Planner Recruitment 2025 is a government job recruitment programme aimed at selecting eligible candidates for the post of Assistant Town Planner in the state of Uttar Pradesh.

The programme is open to Indian citizens who meet the eligibility criteria, and the selection process involves a written examination and an interview.
